message:
feat(audit): add operator intervention storage layer and artifact metadata

Implements core infrastructure for operator intervention audit trail:

Schema (operator-intervention.ts) - 33 tests:
- InterventionTypeSchema (artifact_edit, delta_exclusion, etc.)
- InterventionSeveritySchema (minor, moderate, major, critical)
- OperatorInterventionSchema with full validation
- InterventionSummarySchema for aggregation
- Factory functions: createInterventionId, determineInterventionSeverity
- Helpers: validateIntervention, isCleanSession, aggregateInterventions

Storage (intervention-storage.ts) - 26 tests:
- File-based storage in .research/interventions/
- Session file operations (load/save per session)
- Cross-session index for queries
- Query by severity, type, operator
- Aggregation and statistics
- Time-range queries

Artifact metadata (artifact-merge.ts) - 3 tests:
- InterventionMetadata interface for compiled artifacts
- createInterventionMetadata() helper from InterventionSummary
- Added interventions field to ArtifactMetadata

closes brenner_bot-mqg7
